nasb.text: and he said, “Behold, I see the heavens opened up and the Son of Man standing at the right hand of God.”

esv.text: And he said, “Behold, I see the heavens opened, and the Son of Man standing at the right hand of God.”

cnv.text: 就說：“看哪！我看見天開了，人子站在　神的右邊。”

ccb.text: 司提凡说：“看啊！我看见天开了，人子站在上帝的右边。”

csbs.text: 他说：“看哪，我看见诸天开了，人子站在神的右边。”
